== Trivia ==
* His favorite champions are {{ci|Kassadin}} and {{ci|Vayne}}.<ref>[http://www.thisisgame.com/board/view.php?id=1129644&category=13737&subcategory= Team OP Interview] ''thisisgame.com''</ref>

* According to [[Locodoco]], he usually smokes while he plays.
